title: Jerma Disc Mod
description: A bunch of discs with jerma remixes from japanesecoffee.
body:
# Jerma Disc Mod 
A mod that adds music discs with Jerma remixes. All credit for the music goes to [japanesecoffee](https://www.youtube.com/@japanesecoffeemusic/), this mod started for me and my friends but I'm ~~attempting~~ going to make it into a bigger project.

![Showing off 20 Discs from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27b06051798e0f0d4fdecb792d3ca17db86e9861.png)

Currently have 20/114 remixes made into discs, along with recipes and progression for each.

[Playlist where the songs can be found](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sTIicXMa8Dg&list=PLYAmgN75KS2dyyIlXZMMY51hE6ucYRhY8&index=1)

## Reminder:
Don't take this mod seriously!

It is quite literally just Jerma remixes put onto discs with lazy progression.

If you happen to make the mistake of including this mod in a modpack then, please remove it, if it was intentional to add it, you can put it there, you don't even have to credit me as long as it's a modpack on modrinth.

This is also my first mod I have ever made so there might be some bugs, but I'm pretty sure I got all of them.
